# FFERR_EFFECTTYPENOTSUPPORTED | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Force Feedback ](/documentation/forcefeedback)

- [ FFERR_EFFECTTYPENOTSUPPORTED ](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_effecttypenotsupported)

-  FFERR_EFFECTTYPENOTSUPPORTED 

Global Variable# FFERR_EFFECTTYPENOTSUPPORTED

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFERR_EFFECTTYPENOTSUPPORTED: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_effecttypenotsupported#Discussion)

The effect type requested is not explicitly supported by the particular device.
